FAQ

Quick answers

How far in advance?+
2–3 days recommended, but we often handle same-day requests. Just message us!
Is delivery really free?+
Yes — 100% free delivery and pickup anywhere in Orlando. No hidden fees ever.
Allowed in Disney parks?+
Absolutely! All our strollers meet Disney's current size and folding requirements.
Payment methods?+
All major credit cards, Zelle, PayPal, Venmo, and cash. Link sent via WhatsApp.

How It Works

Ready in 4 easy steps

From booking to magical moments — we make it effortless so you can enjoy every second of your Orlando adventure.

1
📱
Message Us on WhatsApp
Tell us your dates, hotel, and which stroller or scooter you need. We respond within minutes.
2
📅
Choose Your Dates
Pick your rental period. We're flexible — daily, weekly, or for your full Disney trip.
3
🚪
Free Delivery to Your Hotel
We deliver right to your resort — Disney, Universal, or any Orlando hotel — at no extra cost.
4
✨
Enjoy the Magic
Focus on creating unforgettable family memories. We handle the rest, including pickup when you're done.

Why Choose Us

Built for family moments
that last forever

We started My Stroller because we know how exhausting theme park travel can be with little ones. Every detail of our service is designed to give families one less thing to worry about — so the magic can shine through.

  • ✓
    Free delivery & pickup anywhere in Orlando
    Disney, Universal, SeaWorld, hotels, Airbnb — everywhere
  • ✓
    Professionally sanitized before every rental
    Your child's safety is always our top priority
  • ✓
    24/7 WhatsApp support during your trip
    Real humans, fast responses — always here for you
  • ✓
    Flexible booking — change or cancel anytime
    Plans change. We get it. No stress, no penalties.

Got Questions?

Frequently asked questions

How far in advance should I book?
+
We recommend booking at least 2–3 days before your arrival date to ensure availability, especially during peak Disney seasons. However, we often accommodate same-day or next-day requests — just message us on WhatsApp!
Is delivery really free?
+
Yes, 100% free delivery and pickup anywhere in the Orlando area — Disney resorts, Universal hotels, vacation rentals, Airbnbs, and beyond. No hidden fees, ever.
Are the strollers allowed inside Disney parks?
+
Absolutely! All our strollers comply with Disney's current size and folding requirements. They fit perfectly on all rides, through all gates, and in all designated stroller parking areas.
What if something breaks during my rental?
+
Just message us on WhatsApp! We provide 24/7 support during your trip and will quickly arrange a replacement if needed. Your vacation experience always comes first.
Can I extend my rental?
+
Yes! Extensions are easy to arrange. Just message us before your rental period ends and we'll adjust your booking. We love when families are having so much fun they want to stay longer!
How clean are the strollers?
+
Each stroller and scooter goes through our professional sanitization process between every single rental. We use family-safe, hospital-grade cleaning products so your child's safety is always protected.
Do you deliver to vacation rentals and Airbnbs?
+
Yes! We deliver to any address in the Orlando area — Disney resort hotels, Universal hotels, Marriotts, Hiltons, Airbnbs, vacation homes, and anywhere else you're staying.
What payment methods do you accept?
+
We accept all major credit cards, Zelle, PayPal, Venmo, and cash. Payment is quick and secure — we'll send a payment link right through WhatsApp for your convenience.
